AND
Any of the following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based Target initiative:
'1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 point
OR
'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 points
OR
'2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 points
If any of the above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional points can be awarded for the following two criteria:
ii) Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND figure provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' is equal to or greater than the percentage of time from date provided in column 'End date of base year'
OR
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND 'New' selected in column 'Target Status in reporting year' - 1 point
iii) Any of the following are met - 1 point
The reported scope 3 target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND all the following must be met in the same row:
'Scope 3' selected in column 'Scopes' AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' AND
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8 AND
Figure greater than 66% provided in column ‘% of total base year emissions in Scope 3 (in all Scope 3 categories) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure '
OR
If total Scope 3 emissions as reported in question 7.8 are less than 40% of your total emissions all the following must be met:
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8
OR
The reported supplier engagement target(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based Target initiative in question 7.54.2.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met in each row for that row to be eligible for Management points:
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year':
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then all of the route's criteria must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the route's criteria must be met in both rows.
- Rows that have only disclosed Scope 3 targets will not meet the eligibility to be assessed at Management level. Management level assesses disclosed Scope 1 and 2 emissions targets on both the CDP and SBTi routes.
- If any relevant exclusions are reported in 7.4.1 the maximum points available at management level are 1/4 points.
SBTi ROUTE)

The Net Zero target has been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
OR
If a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND

OR
CDP ROUTE)

OR
Either 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, but we have not committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years' OR 'No…' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' AND at least 4/5 Awareness points awarded in row(s) with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'

OR

iv) 'No' selected in question 7.4 OR
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to a recent acquisition or merger' selected in all of the following columns in question 7.4.1 - 0.25 points
- 'Relevance of Scope 1 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
If criteria i), ii), iii) AND iv) are met an additional point is available along the CDP ROUTE for the following:

One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).

criteria.criteria:
At least 3/4 Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in both rows.
- If you are reporting a Scope 1 and 2 target that has been approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity target in another row in question 7.53.2 OR a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute target in question 7.53.1 and be awarded points for criterion iii)
SBTi ROUTE)
i) The reported Scope 1 and 2 target(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND
Any of the following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based Target initiative:
'1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 point
OR
'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 points
OR
'2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 points
If any of the above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional points can be awarded for the following two criteria:
ii) Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND figure provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' is equal to or greater than the percentage of time from date provided in column 'End date of base year'
OR
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND 'New' selected in column 'Target Status in reporting year' - 1 point
iii) Any of the following are met - 1 point
The reported scope 3 target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND all the following must be met in the same row:
'Scope 3' selected in column 'Scopes' AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' AND
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8 AND
Figure greater than 66% provided in column ‘% of total base year emissions in Scope 3 (in all Scope 3 categories) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure '
OR
If total Scope 3 emissions as reported in question 7.8 are less than 40% of your total emissions all the following must be met:
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8
OR
The reported supplier engagement target(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based Target initiative in question 7.54.2.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

A 최고 of 3/3 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). Best 행(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed excluding the following columns:
- 'Intensity figure in base year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in base year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure at end date of target for all selected Scopes'
- '% of target achieved relative to base year'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 14/14 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 아래 열을 제외하고, 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다: - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure at end date of 목표 for all 선택 Scopes' - '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 14/14점입니다.

criteria.criteria:

At least 8 Disclosure points awarded AND
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is not before Date provided in column 'End date of base year'.
SBTi ROUTE)

OR

A maximum of 5/5 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).

SBTi 경로) The 목표(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 - 5/5 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). One 행 scored. 또는 CDP 경로) i) Date 입력 in 열 'End date of 목표' is 4 years 또는 more after Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is before the end 의 date 입력 in 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 ii) 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 1 점 - '예, 및 this 목표 has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 this 목표 is currently being reviewed by the Science-Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 we have committed to seek validation of this 목표 by the Science-based 목표 이니셔티브 in the next two years' 또는 'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 0.5/1 점 iii) Figure 초과 0 입력 in 열 '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 또는 '신규' 선택 in 열 '목표 status in 보고연도' 그리고 date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is within the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the CDP 경로). criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met in each row for that row to be eligible for Management points:
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year':
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
Please note:
- Rows that have only disclosed Scope 3 targets will not meet the eligibility to be assessed at Management level. Management level assesses disclosed Scope 1 emissions targets on both the CDP and SBTi routes.
- If any relevant exclusions are reported in 7.4.1 the maximum points available at management level are 1/4 points.
SBTi ROUTE)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
i) The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 3 points
If criterion i) is met an additional point is available along the SBTi ROUTE for the following if a net zero target is reported:
ii) Either of the following are met - 1 point
The Net Zero target has been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
OR
If a long-term Scope 1 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
OR
CDP ROUTE)
Full Awareness points awarded in a row(s) that with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
OR
Either 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, but we have not committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years' OR 'No…' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' AND at least 4/5 Awareness points awarded in row(s) with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
i) 'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' - 1 point
ii) Figure provided in column '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 emissions - 1 point
iii) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 5 and 10 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.75 points
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 11 and 15 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.5 points
iv) 'No' selected in question 7.4 OR
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to a recent acquisition or merger' selected in column 'Relevance of Scope 1 emissions from this source' in question 7.4.1 - 0.25 points
If criteria i), ii), iii) AND iv) are met an additional point is available along the CDP ROUTE for the following:
v) If a net zero target is reported in question 7.54.3 AND a long-term Scope 1 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met - 1 point:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

- 'Intensity figure in base year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in base year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure at end date of target for all selected Scopes'
- '% of target achieved relative to base year'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 14/14 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 아래 열을 제외하고, 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다: - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure at end date of 목표 for all 선택 Scopes' - '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 14/14점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Awareness points:
At least 8 Disclosure points awarded AND
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is not before Date provided in column 'End date of base year'.
SBTi ROUTE)
The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 5/5 points
A maximum of 5/5 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
One row scored.
OR
CDP ROUTE)
i) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 4 years or more after Date provided in column 'Date target was set' AND Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the end of the date provided in column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 - 2 points
ii) Any of the following selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 1 point
- 'Yes, and this target has been approved by the Science Based Targets initiative'
- 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and this target is currently being reviewed by the Science-Based Targets initiative'
- 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and we have committed to seek validation of this target by the Science-based target initiative in the next two years'
OR
'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 0.5/1 points
iii) Figure greater than 0 provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' OR
'New' selected in column 'Target status in reporting year' AND date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 - 2 points
A maximum of 5/5 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
One row scored.

SBTi 경로) The 목표(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 - 5/5 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). One 행 scored. 또는 CDP 경로) i) Date 입력 in 열 'End date of 목표' is 4 years 또는 more after Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is before the end 의 date 입력 in 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 ii) 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 1 점 - '예, 및 this 목표 has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 this 목표 is currently being reviewed by the Science-Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 we have committed to seek validation of this 목표 by the Science-based 목표 이니셔티브 in the next two years' 또는 'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 0.5/1 점 iii) Figure 초과 0 입력 in 열 '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 또는 '신규' 선택 in 열 '목표 status in 보고연도' 그리고 date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is within the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the CDP 경로). One 행 scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met in each row for that row to be eligible for Management points:
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year':
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then all of the route's criteria must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the route's criteria must be met in both rows.
- Rows that have only disclosed Scope 3 targets will not meet the eligibility to be assessed at Management level. Management level assesses disclosed Scope 1 and 2 emissions targets on both the CDP and SBTi routes.
- If any relevant exclusions are reported in 7.4.1 the maximum points available at management level are 1/4 points.
SBTi ROUTE)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
i) The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 3 points
If criterion i) is met an additional point is available along the SBTi ROUTE for the following if a net zero target is reported:
ii) Either of the following are met - 1 point
The Net Zero target has been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
OR
If a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
OR
CDP ROUTE)
Full Awareness points awarded in row(s) that with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
OR
Either 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, but we have not committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years' OR 'No…' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' AND at least 4/5 Awareness points awarded in row(s) with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
i) 'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' - 1 point
ii) Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions - 1 point
iii) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 5 and 10 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.75 points
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 11 and 15 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.5 points
iv) 'No' selected in question 7.4 OR
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to a recent acquisition or merger' selected in all of the following columns in question 7.4.1 - 0.25 points
- 'Relevance of Scope 1 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
If criteria i), ii), iii) AND iv) are met an additional point is available along the CDP ROUTE for the following:
v) If a net zero target is reported in question 7.54.3 AND a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met - 1 point:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
At least 3/4 Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in both rows.
- If you are reporting a Scope 1 and 2 target that has been approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity target in another row in question 7.53.2 OR a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute target in question 7.53.1 and be awarded points for criterion iii)
SBTi ROUTE)
i) The reported Scope 1 and 2 target(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND
Any of the following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based Target initiative:
'1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 point
OR
'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 points
OR
'2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 points
If any of the above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional points can be awarded for the following two criteria:
ii) Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND figure provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' is equal to or greater than the percentage of time from date provided in column 'End date of base year'
OR
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND 'New' selected in column 'Target Status in reporting year' - 1 point
iii) Any of the following are met - 1 point
The reported scope 3 target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND all the following must be met in the same row:
'Scope 3' selected in column 'Scopes' AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' AND
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8 AND
Figure greater than 66% provided in column ‘% of total base year emissions in Scope 3 (in all Scope 3 categories) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure '
OR
If total Scope 3 emissions as reported in question 7.8 are less than 40% of your total emissions all the following must be met:
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8
OR
The reported supplier engagement target(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based Target initiative in question 7.54.2.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

A 최고 of 3/3 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). Best 행(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met in each row for that row to be eligible for Management points:
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year':
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then all of the route's criteria must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the route's criteria must be met in both rows.
- Rows that have only disclosed Scope 3 targets will not meet the eligibility to be assessed at Management level. Management level assesses disclosed Scope 1 and 2 emissions targets on both the CDP and SBTi routes.
- If any relevant exclusions are reported in 7.4.1 the maximum points available at management level are 1/4 points.
SBTi ROUTE)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
i) The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 3 points
If criterion i) is met an additional point is available along the SBTi ROUTE for the following if a net zero target is reported:
ii) Either of the following are met - 1 point
The Net Zero target has been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
OR
If a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
OR
CDP ROUTE)
Full Awareness points awarded in row(s) that with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
OR
Either 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, but we have not committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years' OR 'No…' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' AND at least 4/5 Awareness points awarded in row(s) with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
i) 'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' - 1 point
ii) Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions - 1 point
iii) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 5 and 10 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.75 points
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 11 and 15 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.5 points
iv) 'No' selected in question 7.4 OR
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to a recent acquisition or merger' selected in all of the following columns in question 7.4.1 - 0.25 points
- 'Relevance of Scope 1 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
If criteria i), ii), iii) AND iv) are met an additional point is available along the CDP ROUTE for the following:
v) If a net zero target is reported in question 7.54.3 AND a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met - 1 point:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
At least 3/4 Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in both rows.
- If you are reporting a Scope 1 and 2 target that has been approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity target in another row in question 7.53.2 OR a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute target in question 7.53.1 and be awarded points for criterion iii)
SBTi ROUTE)
i) The reported Scope 1 and 2 target(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND
Any of the following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based Target initiative:
'1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 point
OR
'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 points
OR
'2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 points
If any of the above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional points can be awarded for the following two criteria:
ii) Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND figure provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' is equal to or greater than the percentage of time from date provided in column 'End date of base year'
OR
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND 'New' selected in column 'Target Status in reporting year' - 1 point
iii) Any of the following are met - 1 point
The reported scope 3 target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND all the following must be met in the same row:
'Scope 3' selected in column 'Scopes' AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' AND
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8 AND
Figure greater than 66% provided in column ‘% of total base year emissions in Scope 3 (in all Scope 3 categories) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure '
OR
If total Scope 3 emissions as reported in question 7.8 are less than 40% of your total emissions all the following must be met:
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8
OR
The reported supplier engagement target(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based Target initiative in question 7.54.2.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed excluding the following columns:
- 'Intensity figure in base year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in base year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure at end date of target for all selected Scopes'
- '% of target achieved relative to base year'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 14/14 points is available for this question.

- If you are reporting a Scope 1 and 2 target that has been approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity target in another row in question 7.53.2 OR a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute target in question 7.53.1 and be awarded points for criterion iii)

OR

criteria.criteria:
At least 3/4 Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in both rows.
- If you are reporting a Scope 1 and 2 target that has been approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity target in another row in question 7.53.2 OR a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute target in question 7.53.1 and be awarded points for criterion iii)
SBTi ROUTE)
i) The reported Scope 1 and 2 target(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND
Any of the following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based Target initiative:
'1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 point
OR
'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 points
OR
'2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 points
If any of the above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional points can be awarded for the following two criteria:
ii) Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND figure provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' is equal to or greater than the percentage of time from date provided in column 'End date of base year'
OR
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND 'New' selected in column 'Target Status in reporting year' - 1 point
iii) Any of the following are met - 1 point
The reported scope 3 target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND all the following must be met in the same row:
'Scope 3' selected in column 'Scopes' AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' AND
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8 AND
Figure greater than 66% provided in column ‘% of total base year emissions in Scope 3 (in all Scope 3 categories) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure '
OR
If total Scope 3 emissions as reported in question 7.8 are less than 40% of your total emissions all the following must be met:
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8
OR
The reported supplier engagement target(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based Target initiative in question 7.54.2.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

A 최고 of 3/3 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). Best 행(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed excluding the following columns:
- 'Intensity figure in base year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in base year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure at end date of target for all selected Scopes'
- '% of target achieved relative to base year'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 14/14 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 아래 열을 제외하고, 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다: - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure at end date of 목표 for all 선택 Scopes' - '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 14/14점입니다.

criteria.criteria:

At least 8 Disclosure points awarded AND
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is not before Date provided in column 'End date of base year'.
SBTi ROUTE)

OR

A maximum of 5/5 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).

SBTi 경로) The 목표(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 - 5/5 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). One 행 scored. 또는 CDP 경로) i) Date 입력 in 열 'End date of 목표' is 4 years 또는 more after Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is before the end 의 date 입력 in 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 ii) 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 1 점 - '예, 및 this 목표 has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 this 목표 is currently being reviewed by the Science-Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 we have committed to seek validation of this 목표 by the Science-based 목표 이니셔티브 in the next two years' 또는 'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 0.5/1 점 iii) Figure 초과 0 입력 in 열 '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 또는 '신규' 선택 in 열 '목표 status in 보고연도' 그리고 date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is within the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the CDP 경로). criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met in each row for that row to be eligible for Management points:
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year':
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
Please note:
- Rows that have only disclosed Scope 3 targets will not meet the eligibility to be assessed at Management level. Management level assesses disclosed Scope 1 emissions targets on both the CDP and SBTi routes.
- If any relevant exclusions are reported in 7.4.1 the maximum points available at management level are 1/4 points.
SBTi ROUTE)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
i) The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 3 points
If criterion i) is met an additional point is available along the SBTi ROUTE for the following if a net zero target is reported:
ii) Either of the following are met - 1 point
The Net Zero target has been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
OR
If a long-term Scope 1 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
OR
CDP ROUTE)
Full Awareness points awarded in a row(s) that with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
OR
Either 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, but we have not committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years' OR 'No…' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' AND at least 4/5 Awareness points awarded in row(s) with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
i) 'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' - 1 point
ii) Figure provided in column '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 emissions - 1 point
iii) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 5 and 10 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.75 points
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 11 and 15 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.5 points
iv) 'No' selected in question 7.4 OR
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to a recent acquisition or merger' selected in column 'Relevance of Scope 1 emissions from this source' in question 7.4.1 - 0.25 points
If criteria i), ii), iii) AND iv) are met an additional point is available along the CDP ROUTE for the following:
v) If a net zero target is reported in question 7.54.3 AND a long-term Scope 1 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met - 1 point:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
At least 3/4 Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in both rows.
- If you are reporting a Scope 1 and 2 target that has been approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity target in another row in question 7.53.2 OR a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute target in question 7.53.1 and be awarded points for criterion iii)
SBTi ROUTE)
i) The reported Scope 1 and 2 target(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND
Any of the following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based Target initiative:
'1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 point
OR
'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 points
OR
'2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 points
If any of the above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional points can be awarded for the following two criteria:
ii) Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND figure provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' is equal to or greater than the percentage of time from date provided in column 'End date of base year'
OR
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND 'New' selected in column 'Target Status in reporting year' - 1 point
iii) Any of the following are met - 1 point
The reported scope 3 target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND all the following must be met in the same row:
'Scope 3' selected in column 'Scopes' AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' AND
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8 AND
Figure greater than 66% provided in column ‘% of total base year emissions in Scope 3 (in all Scope 3 categories) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure '
OR
If total Scope 3 emissions as reported in question 7.8 are less than 40% of your total emissions all the following must be met:
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8
OR
The reported supplier engagement target(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based Target initiative in question 7.54.2.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

- 'Intensity figure in base year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in base year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure at end date of target for all selected Scopes'
- '% of target achieved relative to base year'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 14/14 points is available for this question.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met in each row for that row to be eligible for Management points:
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year':
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then all of the route's criteria must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the route's criteria must be met in both rows.
- Rows that have only disclosed Scope 3 targets will not meet the eligibility to be assessed at Management level. Management level assesses disclosed Scope 1 and 2 emissions targets on both the CDP and SBTi routes.
- If any relevant exclusions are reported in 7.4.1 the maximum points available at management level are 1/4 points.
SBTi ROUTE)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
i) The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 3 points
If criterion i) is met an additional point is available along the SBTi ROUTE for the following if a net zero target is reported:
ii) Either of the following are met - 1 point
The Net Zero target has been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
OR
If a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
OR
CDP ROUTE)
Full Awareness points awarded in row(s) that with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
OR
Either 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, but we have not committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years' OR 'No…' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' AND at least 4/5 Awareness points awarded in row(s) with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
i) 'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' - 1 point
ii) Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions - 1 point
iii) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 5 and 10 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.75 points
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 11 and 15 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.5 points
iv) 'No' selected in question 7.4 OR
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to a recent acquisition or merger' selected in all of the following columns in question 7.4.1 - 0.25 points
- 'Relevance of Scope 1 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
If criteria i), ii), iii) AND iv) are met an additional point is available along the CDP ROUTE for the following:
v) If a net zero target is reported in question 7.54.3 AND a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met - 1 point:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).

criteria.criteria:
At least 3/4 Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in both rows.
- If you are reporting a Scope 1 and 2 target that has been approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity target in another row in question 7.53.2 OR a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute target in question 7.53.1 and be awarded points for criterion iii)
SBTi ROUTE)
i) The reported Scope 1 and 2 target(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND
Any of the following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based Target initiative:
'1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 point
OR
'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 points
OR
'2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 points
If any of the above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional points can be awarded for the following two criteria:
ii) Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND figure provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' is equal to or greater than the percentage of time from date provided in column 'End date of base year'
OR
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND 'New' selected in column 'Target Status in reporting year' - 1 point
iii) Any of the following are met - 1 point
The reported scope 3 target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND all the following must be met in the same row:
'Scope 3' selected in column 'Scopes' AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' AND
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8 AND
Figure greater than 66% provided in column ‘% of total base year emissions in Scope 3 (in all Scope 3 categories) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure '
OR
If total Scope 3 emissions as reported in question 7.8 are less than 40% of your total emissions all the following must be met:
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8
OR
The reported supplier engagement target(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based Target initiative in question 7.54.2.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 최소 3/4 관리 점수를 획득해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for 리더십 점. Please note: - In both the SBTi 및 CDP 경로s, 만약 a Scope 1 및 2 목표 is 공개 in one 행, then 기준 (i) 및 (ii) 해야 합니다 be met in that one 행. 만약 a Scope 1 목표 및 a Scope 2 목표 are 공개 in separate 행, then 기준 (i) 및 (ii) 해야 합니다 be met in both 행. - 만약 you are reporting a Scope 1 및 2 목표 that has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity 목표 in another 행 in 문항 7.53.2 또는 a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute 목표 in 문항 7.53.1 및 be awarded 점 for criterion iii) SBTi 경로) i) The 보고 Scope 1 및 2 목표(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 그리고 하나 이상 의 following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브: '1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 점 또는 'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 점 또는 '2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 점 만약 하나 이상 의 above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional 점 can be awarded 에 대한 following two 기준: ii) Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is before the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 그리고 figure 입력 in 열 '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' is equal to 또는 초과 the percentage of time from date 입력 in 열 'End date of 기준연도' 또는 Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is within the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 그리고 '신규' 선택 in 열 '목표 Status in 보고연도' - 1 점 iii) 하나 이상 의 following are met - 1 점 The 보고 scope 3 목표(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 그리고 all the following 해야 합니다 be met in the same 행: 'Scope 3' 선택 in 열 'Scopes' 그리고 'Organization-wide' 선택 in 열 '목표 coverage' 그리고 Criterion ii) 해야 합니다 be awarded at 관리 level in 문항 7.8 그리고 Figure 초과 66% 입력 in 열 ‘% of total 기준연도 emissions in Scope 3 (in all 과학기반감축목표(SBT) 여부) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure ' 또는 만약 total Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 문항 7.8 are 미만 40% of your total emissions all the following 해야 합니다 be met: Criterion ii) 해야 합니다 be awarded at 관리 level in 문항 7.8 또는 The 보고 supplier 참여 목표(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 in 문항 7.54.2. A 최고 of 3/3 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). Best 행(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed excluding the following columns:
- 'Intensity figure in base year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in base year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure at end date of target for all selected Scopes'
- '% of target achieved relative to base year'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 14/14 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 아래 열을 제외하고, 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다: - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure at end date of 목표 for all 선택 Scopes' - '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 14/14점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Awareness points:
At least 8 Disclosure points awarded AND
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is not before Date provided in column 'End date of base year'.
SBTi ROUTE)
The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 5/5 points
A maximum of 5/5 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
One row scored.
OR
CDP ROUTE)
i) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 4 years or more after Date provided in column 'Date target was set' AND Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the end of the date provided in column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 - 2 points
ii) Any of the following selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 1 point
- 'Yes, and this target has been approved by the Science Based Targets initiative'
- 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and this target is currently being reviewed by the Science-Based Targets initiative'
- 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and we have committed to seek validation of this target by the Science-based target initiative in the next two years'
OR
'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 0.5/1 points
iii) Figure greater than 0 provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' OR
'New' selected in column 'Target status in reporting year' AND date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 - 2 points
A maximum of 5/5 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
One row scored.

SBTi 경로) The 목표(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 - 5/5 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). One 행 scored. 또는 CDP 경로) i) Date 입력 in 열 'End date of 목표' is 4 years 또는 more after Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is before the end 의 date 입력 in 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 ii) 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 1 점 - '예, 및 this 목표 has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 this 목표 is currently being reviewed by the Science-Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 we have committed to seek validation of this 목표 by the Science-based 목표 이니셔티브 in the next two years' 또는 'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 0.5/1 점 iii) Figure 초과 0 입력 in 열 '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 또는 '신규' 선택 in 열 '목표 status in 보고연도' 그리고 date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is within the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the CDP 경로). One 행 scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met in each row for that row to be eligible for Management points:
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year':
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then all of the route's criteria must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the route's criteria must be met in both rows.
- Rows that have only disclosed Scope 3 targets will not meet the eligibility to be assessed at Management level. Management level assesses disclosed Scope 1 and 2 emissions targets on both the CDP and SBTi routes.
- If any relevant exclusions are reported in 7.4.1 the maximum points available at management level are 1/4 points.
SBTi ROUTE)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
i) The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 3 points
If criterion i) is met an additional point is available along the SBTi ROUTE for the following if a net zero target is reported:
ii) Either of the following are met - 1 point
The Net Zero target has been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
OR
If a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
OR
CDP ROUTE)
Full Awareness points awarded in row(s) that with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
OR
Either 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, but we have not committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years' OR 'No…' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' AND at least 4/5 Awareness points awarded in row(s) with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
i) 'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' - 1 point
ii) Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions - 1 point
iii) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 5 and 10 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.75 points
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 11 and 15 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.5 points
iv) 'No' selected in question 7.4 OR
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to a recent acquisition or merger' selected in all of the following columns in question 7.4.1 - 0.25 points
- 'Relevance of Scope 1 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
If criteria i), ii), iii) AND iv) are met an additional point is available along the CDP ROUTE for the following:
v) If a net zero target is reported in question 7.54.3 AND a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met - 1 point:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
At least 3/4 Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then criteria (i) and (ii) must be met in both rows.
- If you are reporting a Scope 1 and 2 target that has been approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity target in another row in question 7.53.2 OR a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute target in question 7.53.1 and be awarded points for criterion iii)
SBTi ROUTE)
i) The reported Scope 1 and 2 target(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND
Any of the following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based Target initiative:
'1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 point
OR
'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 points
OR
'2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 points
If any of the above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional points can be awarded for the following two criteria:
ii) Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND figure provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' is equal to or greater than the percentage of time from date provided in column 'End date of base year'
OR
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 AND 'New' selected in column 'Target Status in reporting year' - 1 point
iii) Any of the following are met - 1 point
The reported scope 3 target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
AND all the following must be met in the same row:
'Scope 3' selected in column 'Scopes' AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' AND
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8 AND
Figure greater than 66% provided in column ‘% of total base year emissions in Scope 3 (in all Scope 3 categories) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure '
OR
If total Scope 3 emissions as reported in question 7.8 are less than 40% of your total emissions all the following must be met:
Criterion ii) must be awarded at Management level in question 7.8
OR
The reported supplier engagement target(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based Target initiative in question 7.54.2.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 최소 3/4 관리 점수를 획득해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for 리더십 점. Please note: - In both the SBTi 및 CDP 경로s, 만약 a Scope 1 및 2 목표 is 공개 in one 행, then 기준 (i) 및 (ii) 해야 합니다 be met in that one 행. 만약 a Scope 1 목표 및 a Scope 2 목표 are 공개 in separate 행, then 기준 (i) 및 (ii) 해야 합니다 be met in both 행. - 만약 you are reporting a Scope 1 및 2 목표 that has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브, it is possible to report a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved intensity 목표 in another 행 in 문항 7.53.2 또는 a separate Scope 3 SBTi approved absolute 목표 in 문항 7.53.1 및 be awarded 점 for criterion iii) SBTi 경로) i) The 보고 Scope 1 및 2 목표(s) has/(have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 그리고 하나 이상 의 following temperature alignments are approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브: '1.5⁰C aligned' - 1 점 또는 'Well-below 2⁰C aligned' - 0.75 점 또는 '2⁰C aligned' - 0.5 점 만약 하나 이상 의 above conditions within criterion i) have been met, additional 점 can be awarded 에 대한 following two 기준: ii) Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is before the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 그리고 figure 입력 in 열 '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' is equal to 또는 초과 the percentage of time from date 입력 in 열 'End date of 기준연도' 또는 Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is within the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 그리고 '신규' 선택 in 열 '목표 Status in 보고연도' - 1 점 iii) 하나 이상 의 following are met - 1 점 The 보고 scope 3 목표(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 그리고 all the following 해야 합니다 be met in the same 행: 'Scope 3' 선택 in 열 'Scopes' 그리고 'Organization-wide' 선택 in 열 '목표 coverage' 그리고 Criterion ii) 해야 합니다 be awarded at 관리 level in 문항 7.8 그리고 Figure 초과 66% 입력 in 열 ‘% of total 기준연도 emissions in Scope 3 (in all 과학기반감축목표(SBT) 여부) covered by this total Scope 3 intensity figure ' 또는 만약 total Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 문항 7.8 are 미만 40% of your total emissions all the following 해야 합니다 be met: Criterion ii) 해야 합니다 be awarded at 관리 level in 문항 7.8 또는 The 보고 supplier 참여 목표(s) has(/have) been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 in 문항 7.54.2. A 최고 of 3/3 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). Best 행(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed excluding the following columns:
- 'Intensity figure in base year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in base year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for total Scope 3'
- 'Intensity figure in reporting year for all selected Scopes'
- 'Intensity figure at end date of target for all selected Scopes'
- '% of target achieved relative to base year'
Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 14/14 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 아래 열을 제외하고, 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다: - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 기준연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for total Scope 3' - 'Intensity figure in 보고연도 for all 선택 Scopes' - 'Intensity figure at end date of 목표 for all 선택 Scopes' - '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 14/14점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Awareness points:
At least 8 Disclosure points awarded AND
Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is not before Date provided in column 'End date of base year'.
SBTi ROUTE)
The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 5/5 points
A maximum of 5/5 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
One row scored.
OR
CDP ROUTE)
i) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 4 years or more after Date provided in column 'Date target was set' AND Date provided in column 'Date target was set' is before the end of the date provided in column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 - 2 points
ii) Any of the following selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 1 point
- 'Yes, and this target has been approved by the Science Based Targets initiative'
- 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and this target is currently being reviewed by the Science-Based Targets initiative'
- 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, and we have committed to seek validation of this target by the Science-based target initiative in the next two years'
OR
'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' - 0.5/1 points
iii) Figure greater than 0 provided in column '% of target achieved relative to base year' OR
'New' selected in column 'Target status in reporting year' AND date provided in column 'Date target was set' is within the reporting year indicated by column 'End date of reporting year' in question 1.4 - 2 points
A maximum of 5/5 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
One row scored.

SBTi 경로) The 목표(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 - 5/5 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the SBTi 경로). One 행 scored. 또는 CDP 경로) i) Date 입력 in 열 'End date of 목표' is 4 years 또는 more after Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' 그리고 Date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is before the end 의 date 입력 in 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 ii) 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 1 점 - '예, 및 this 목표 has been approved by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 this 목표 is currently being reviewed by the Science-Based 목표 이니셔티브' - '예, we consider this a science-based 목표, 및 we have committed to seek validation of this 목표 by the Science-based 목표 이니셔티브 in the next two years' 또는 'No, but we anticipate setting one in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Is this a science-based 목표?' - 0.5/1 점 iii) Figure 초과 0 입력 in 열 '% of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도' 또는 '신규' 선택 in 열 '목표 status in 보고연도' 그리고 date 입력 in 열 'Date 목표 was set' is within the 보고연도 indicated by 열 'End date of 보고연도' in 문항 1.4 - 2 점 A 최고 of 5/5 점 is available on the CDP 경로). One 행 scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met in each row for that row to be eligible for Management points:
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year':
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
Please note:
- In both the SBTi and CDP Routes, if a Scope 1 and 2 target is disclosed in one row, then all of the route's criteria must be met in that one row. If a Scope 1 target and a Scope 2 target are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the route's criteria must be met in both rows.
- Rows that have only disclosed Scope 3 targets will not meet the eligibility to be assessed at Management level. Management level assesses disclosed Scope 1 and 2 emissions targets on both the CDP and SBTi routes.
- If any relevant exclusions are reported in 7.4.1 the maximum points available at management level are 1/4 points.
SBTi ROUTE)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
i) The target(s) has(/have) been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative - 3 points
If criterion i) is met an additional point is available along the SBTi ROUTE for the following if a net zero target is reported:
ii) Either of the following are met - 1 point
The Net Zero target has been approved as science-based by the Science Based Target initiative
OR
If a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the SBTi ROUTE).
OR
CDP ROUTE)
Full Awareness points awarded in row(s) that with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
OR
Either 'Yes, we consider this a science-based target, but we have not committed to seek validation of this target by the Science Based Targets initiative within the next two years' OR 'No…' selected in column 'Is this a science-based target?' AND at least 4/5 Awareness points awarded in row(s) with Scope 1 and Scope 2 selected in column 'Scope(s)'
i) 'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' - 1 point
ii) Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions - 1 point
iii) Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 5 and 10 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.75 points
OR
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is between 11 and 15 years after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive - 0.5 points
iv) 'No' selected in question 7.4 OR
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to a recent acquisition or merger' selected in all of the following columns in question 7.4.1 - 0.25 points
- 'Relevance of Scope 1 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
- 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source'
If criteria i), ii), iii) AND iv) are met an additional point is available along the CDP ROUTE for the following:
v) If a net zero target is reported in question 7.54.3 AND a long-term Scope 1 and 2 target(s) is reported and all of the following are met - 1 point:
One complete row in question 7.54.3 AND
'Organization-wide' selected in column 'Target coverage' in question 7.53.2 AND
Date provided in column 'End date of target' is 11 years or more after date provided in column 'Date target was set' inclusive AND before 1st July 2051 in question 7.53.2 AND
Figure provided in both columns '% of total base year emissions in Scope 1 covered by this Scope 1 intensity figure' AND '% of total base year emissions in Scope 2 covered by this Scope 2 intensity figure' is 95% or higher for Scope 1 and 2 emissions in question 7.53.2.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available on the CDP ROUTE).
Best row(s) scored.
